completed_slice.action: Wire the exact-commit hostname evidence gate into the Cloudflare deployment workflow.
completed_slice.verification: Committed workflow source was fetched after the update and inspected for test inclusion, post-deploy gate execution, exact deployment URL and GITHUB_SHA bindings, and proof-bundle retention.

remaining_blocker: The cloudflare-research GitHub environment still requires valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN followed by an authenticated workflow dispatch.
required_next_evidence: served research surface bound to the workflow source commit
next_action: Dispatch .github/workflows/cloudflare-pages-research.yml with valid Cloudflare environment credentials, retain the run and artifact identities, and evaluate the hostname gate plus final evidence manifest before changing C-001 status.
